"[61] LYDIA ALSO HAS ANOTHER DRIVER W/ TRK/TRL ER TO UNLOAD AND RELOAD IF NEEDED ETA 20 MINS"
"[60] LYDIA HAS SAFER ROAD RESCUE IS HD TOW CO ER 888-412-0297"

"[54] ^SUPT/MATT BECKLER CB; CPZ HAZMAT INFO and HAS BEEN IN TOUCH W/ CT631 DIRECT"

"[46] ^CT631 -- RESP PTY HAS MADE ARRANGEMENTS W/ TOW COMPANY TO UPRIGHT THE TLR; WILL BE OO RIVERSIDE DUE TO THE WEIGHT // EFR ENVIRONMENTAL IS ENRT TO HANDLE CLEAN UP // PRELIMINARILY 10 GALS OF BATTERY ACID INTO THE DIRT, BUT HARD TO CONFIRM W/ THE TLR ON ITS SIDE"
